hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Bungalow Fetika- Oteaeva Lodge Fakarava in Fakarava offers spacious guest house accommodation with a garden and terrace. Free WiFi is available in public areas.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features a washing machine, private bathroom, kitchen, barbecue, tea and coffee maker, garden views, hairdryer, dining table, outdoor dining area, refrigerator, free toiletries, microwave, shower, private entrance, tiled floors, dining area, electric kettle, kitchenware, and oven.
Convenient Location: Located 6 km from Fakarava Airport, the guest house provides free on-site private parking. English and French are spoken at reception.
